name: Buttermilk-Cornmeal Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup butter, cut into small pieces and chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and baking soda in a large bowl.
Cut in butter with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Add buttermilk; stir just until dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Turn off heat source (e.g., turn off oven). On a lightly floured surface, knead dough 5 or 6 times.
4. Roll dough to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut with a 2-1/2-inch biscuit cutter.
5. Place on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray. Brush tops with egg white.
6. Bake at 450°F for 12 minutes or until golden.
